items.title: Nebius: Microsoft Buys In, Here's What Comes Next
items.description: Partnership with Microsoft puts Nebius on a path towards monetizing its data center investments. Read more to see why NBIS stock is a Buy.

items.title: Nebius announces multi-billion dollar agreement with Microsoft for AI infrastructure
items.description: AMSTERDAM, September 08, 2025--Nebius Group N.V. (NASDAQ: NBIS) ("Nebius" or the "Company"), a leading AI infrastructure company, today announced an agreement to deliver AI infrastructure to Microsoft.

items.title: Nebius: Microsoft Contract Resets Multiples (Rating Upgrade)
items.description: NBIS stock upgraded to Buy after a $17.4B Microsoft deal set to triple revenue by 2026.

items.title: Microsoft Signs $17.4 Billion AI Deal With Nebius
items.description: Microsoft has agreed to pay $17.4 billion for GPU infrastructure capacity over the next five years from Dutch company Nebius.

items.title: Nebius wins up to $19.4 billion data center deal with Microsoft; shares jump
items.description: Updates with share moves, additional contextInvesting.com-- Shares of Nebius Group (NASDAQ:NBIS) surged more than 40% in extended trading on Monday after the Amsterdam-based AI infrastructure provider announced a landmark agreement with Microsoft Corp.
